Petition For Order For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Continued To Apr-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Sturdevant for Eric Miller.

Mr. Sturdevant stated that he filed verification of the petition on Friday and that he did not do a notice of hearing because there is no one else to serve. The Petition for Order for Termination of Further Proceedings for Lack of Assets is continued to April 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Continued To Mar-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Sturdevant for petitioner Eric Miller.

Mr. Sturdevant reported that in response to the Examiner's notes he had attempted to e-file the petition with a verification attached, but that the filing had been rejected as he had not designated it as an amended petition. The Examiner informed him that he could file the verification as a separate document and avoid the need for filing an amended petition. He responded that he will be filing the verification right away. The matter was continued to March 20, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Vacated

Petition For Order For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Mar-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Mar-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on February 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has not responded to the issues raised in the two tentative rulings. The Petition for Order for Termination for Further Proceedings and for Discharge of Administrator for Lack of Assets is continued to February 27 , 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Sturdevant for (administrator) Eric Miller.

Mr. Sturdevant reported that he had e-filed the petition, that it was rejected as he had not filed a change of address, that he has all of the documents here to file today and that he will e-file them. The Court took the status on close of estate and the Order to Appear off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Oct-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Eric Miller and the Attorney James Sturdevant to appear on October 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory & Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
